description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build TWiLight Menu++ that builds TWiLightMenu++ using devKitARM in a Docker container on every push to any branch except README.md, on every pull request to any branch except README.md, and on every release creation. The workflow checks out the repository, installs tools, builds TWiLightMenu++, creates CIAs, packs 7z packages for nightly and release, and uploads artifacts to GitHub Actions. Additionally, it publishes the build to TWLBot/Builds and sends Discord webhooks on success or failure.
